c730b703-82cf-4a0e-a1dc-d910d73d1ed9.title: If applicable: Description of how and why you are using this policy, guideline or process

c9ed4379-19e2-4ce3-8962-5c2fca69b6cd.text: In one case in the past, all documents that had been assembled by a project in a documentation system had to be deleted because not a single person could decide to move them to a new platform when the documentation system was going off-line.
c9ed4379-19e2-4ce3-8962-5c2fca69b6cd.title: Will someone be given decision power to move documents or data to a new place after the project has finished?

c9ed47c7-49f7-4ea5-895d-1d17c19c36e4.text: What appointment have you made for the naming of the folders? Make sure names are relatively short, and avoid spaces and special characters.
c9ed47c7-49f7-4ea5-895d-1d17c19c36e4.title: What is the naming convention for this folder?

ca0f9465-3116-4824-8651-b592151c5368.text:
Please indicate the license under which this data will be available. Also for internal use, if a dataset is kept but not deposited in an repository (open or with restricted access), defining clear access and reuse conditions is strongly recommended.

For each license you will be able to specify when it starts being applicable, so that you can e.g. specify an embargo period.
ca0f9465-3116-4824-8651-b592151c5368.title: Under which license will the dataset be made available?

ca274d39-ce5b-4c80-b888-ee746a455742.title: Who will have access to the storage solution?

cacee0fd-7de5-4e07-aa94-1661cb853558.text: A human being quickly 'understands' data items and their relations. For good data reusability, it is necessary that computers can understand your data too.
cacee0fd-7de5-4e07-aa94-1661cb853558.title: Are all column headers unambiguous?

cb7d17a8-30c0-489d-a43c-702b27d97611.text:
Indicate how rights to the collected data will be distributed. Rights distribution should be clarified before data collection begins.\
If a consortium agreement exists, refer to it in the chapter 'Legal and ethical aspects'. For cases where rights are unclear, consult your institution’s research office.
cb7d17a8-30c0-489d-a43c-702b27d97611.title: How are the rights to the collected data distributed?

cbbfb0da-caf1-4c04-b72f-de39c4a8fb33.text: The amount of funding needed to maintain a repository is strongly dependent on the services offered. For advanced processing services, ensure budgeting sufficient compute resources for the users.
cbbfb0da-caf1-4c04-b72f-de39c4a8fb33.title: What is the service level you will be offering to users of the data/repository?

cbf8e83c-811c-4635-bdd4-af045730047b.text: Indicate expected costs. If you are converting currencies, remember to indicate the conversion rate.
cbf8e83c-811c-4635-bdd4-af045730047b.title: Expected costs

cc76bce4-f4df-40e0-b28b-dc64b95b7c7b.title: Will you use a folder for each sample/subject?

cc95b399-7d8d-4232-bccf-686f78c91bff.text: Personal information can be sensitive if it is for instance about the health, sexual orientation, religion of a person. But there are also other classes of sensitive information: e.g. locations of rare species in biodiversity could be sensitive and should not leak to poachers.
cc95b399-7d8d-4232-bccf-686f78c91bff.title: Does this dataset contain sensitive information?

ccaaf562-ebed-4d94-b168-b8398ed25546.title: Does each row have an identifier?

ce56042d-f8d1-40e4-929e-588d88e8d945.text: Indicate the single posts and/or the expected sum. If you are converting currencies, remember to indicate the conversion rate.
ce56042d-f8d1-40e4-929e-588d88e8d945.title: Indicate the costs

cf727a0a-78c4-45a7-aa9b-cf7650ae873a.text:
Please add all "formal" identifiers you have for this data set: these can be handles or DOIs or any other type. One important purpose of these identifiers is to be able to find the dataset back.

A good identifier is _persistent_ (i.e. it does not change, and also the same identifier will never be used for another data set), _globally unique_ (nobody else uses the same identifier for a different data set) and _resolvable_ (you can actually locate the data set if you only know the identifier).

Note that if you will be publishing the dataset in a repository, the repository may also assign a persistent identifier. You will be able to specify such additional identifiers under the "publication"-questions. Specify one main identifier here.
cf727a0a-78c4-45a7-aa9b-cf7650ae873a.title: Identifier of the data set

d0428bd7-0308-4cc2-a99c-04b76a1892e4.text: If you are planning to switch to using a different version of the data during the course of the project, this should be indicated.
d0428bd7-0308-4cc2-a99c-04b76a1892e4.title: Which version(s) of the data will you use?

d0bfdeb3-3e81-4933-a877-34ff86131d50.text:
Briefly describe the relationship between this DMP and the related DMP or document.

Example: DMP of the hosting research centre (parent DMP)
d0bfdeb3-3e81-4933-a877-34ff86131d50.title: Description/ Relationship

d1785b0a-b3e3-4949-b88a-40f5e503f2a6.text: Provide reason for deleting (legal/regulatory obligations, no reuse value e.g. bad quality, preserving processed data instead of raw data)

d3778eb2-d363-4b59-8385-13fe21c2b88a.text: If the dataset or source is available at more than one place, pick the repository you will be retrieving the data from.
d3778eb2-d363-4b59-8385-13fe21c2b88a.title: Name of the repository/registry/archive where the data is accessible

d3836d5f-a999-4576-b1d9-56063742f1d7.text:
Specify related contracts. If documents to not have an unique identifier, refer e.g. to the document number in the institutional archival system.

Use 'Add'-button for any new document.
d3836d5f-a999-4576-b1d9-56063742f1d7.title: List related contracts

d4e6a244-07fb-4573-b93f-c20a9409ac7c.text: For optimum reusability data needs to be available for as long as possible. Yet, there may be financial or other reasons to delete the data at a given point.
d4e6a244-07fb-4573-b93f-c20a9409ac7c.title: How long will this data set be kept?

d541351c-f0f5-41ee-a86b-54635426e023.text: <!--> IHR: Perhaps this should be addressed in process/analyze? <--->
d541351c-f0f5-41ee-a86b-54635426e023.title: Will you keep track of what kind of transformations/analysis you will apply to the data?

d87a239f-9aee-4d6a-a5f6-fa83c73e67e1.text: You can use any name/identifier for the data unit/set/collection, make sure that it identifies the data to yourself.
d87a239f-9aee-4d6a-a5f6-fa83c73e67e1.title: Name/identifier of the data

d8de3f6b-f106-4b38-bd0c-a60147f95db9.title: Describe your approach to version control

d9ec692c-f11a-4893-80c9-b28f0ce7ac7b.text:
Does the document have an unambiguous identifier?

Example: Document identifier in ePhorte
d9ec692c-f11a-4893-80c9-b28f0ce7ac7b.title: If applicable: Document number

dad8247a-3553-48dc-8518-d64057cded1e.text: What appointment have you made for the naming of the folders? Make sure names are relatively short, and avoid spaces and special characters.
dad8247a-3553-48dc-8518-d64057cded1e.title: What are the naming conventions for these folders?

daddb974-4fbf-4dbd-a675-17eeb1f83d8a.title: Provide context on how you will use the standard/schema

dbb6dcdf-dd2e-4829-8c03-16b2339ebd5a.title: Will data processing or analysis alter metadata or produce additional metadata?

dbec3230-cfff-4ef3-b96d-a57bdb5f14a3.text: Please control the validity of the link/reference by opening it in a web browser!
dbec3230-cfff-4ef3-b96d-a57bdb5f14a3.title: Link/reference

dc327e53-cf4f-44e7-8e66-40ddf1b4ae0a.text: Project members may need to know about passwords (not sharing accounts, using different passwords for each service, and two factor authentication), about security for data they carry (encryption, backups), data stored in their own labs and in personal cloud accounts, and about the use of open WiFi and HTTPS.
dc327e53-cf4f-44e7-8e66-40ddf1b4ae0a.title: Have project members been instructed about information security (generic and specific to the project)?

dc39957e-688a-4f71-a6a8-57f52509e7cf.text: Some "file" storage systems do not have a tree structure like we know in a file system, but rather have direct pointers to any file in the system. Such systems are called "object stores" or "document stores". Examples are Amazon S3 and CEPH, or MongoDB.
dc39957e-688a-4f71-a6a8-57f52509e7cf.title: Will you be storing data in an "object store" or a "document store" system?

dca23fd4-73c2-46be-8000-7fd278058672.title: At the end of the project, what will happen with data in this storage solution?

de1b1a0f-58ea-4859-91b0-aa2b52090395.title: If applicable: Where do you keep restrictions on the usage of the data?

df36fb68-131c-4f31-a42b-684abf523bbc.text: The following questions can be used to investigate which requirements a shared workspace needs to meet such as the dynamics of the data in the working area, e.g. who works with it, the software that is run on it, etc.
df36fb68-131c-4f31-a42b-684abf523bbc.title: If applicable: Work space considerations

df727291-acab-4b13-9563-1b7d206648ba.text:
If project members or collaborators need to work together on editing documents, different approaches come with different challenges.

Please consider also whether you need a joint space for data analysis and tools, which can be specified in the chapter 'Processing, analysing and interpreting data'.
df727291-acab-4b13-9563-1b7d206648ba.title: Do you need to work together on documents? (e.g. manuscripts)

dfa5e896-4c4c-40a3-a395-2814b9a03573.text: Briefly explain what documentation and metadata accompanies the data. Is the metadata in a standard format?
dfa5e896-4c4c-40a3-a395-2814b9a03573.title: Documentation and metadata that accompanies the data

e0759fdc-7ce9-4020-816d-73119f634c7e.text: Data corruption or mistakes can happen with large amounts of files or large files. Keeping a *master list* with data checksums can be helpful to prevent expensive mistakes, because it will help detect early when data files are damaged or mixed up. It can also be helpful to keep the list under version control so that all changes are well documented.
e0759fdc-7ce9-4020-816d-73119f634c7e.title: Will you be keeping a master list with checksums of data?

e13bf3cb-cf78-486e-b844-2c12320919c4.title: Give a link/reference to the policy, guideline or process

e1d29fa6-2a7d-47d4-8d93-e45537b9e240.text: List the unpublished datasets that you are planning to reuse.
e1d29fa6-2a7d-47d4-8d93-e45537b9e240.title: List unpublished data(sets) that will be reused

e33ae210-62fe-4665-b836-e71660325a06.text: List all technical instruments that you will be using to collect the data.
e33ae210-62fe-4665-b836-e71660325a06.title: Instrument(s) used for data collection

e42e9e6b-d8ec-4fa2-9dfa-fa087c80d9ef.text: Enter the persistent identifier of the dataset, ideally an url where it can be retrieved.
e42e9e6b-d8ec-4fa2-9dfa-fa087c80d9ef.title: Persistent identifier of the dataset

e53810a6-a1c2-4d6c-ada3-66e0bf6ce5fb.title: How will data in this storage solution be structured?

e648be5a-ea9c-4dba-9865-fa68520f9c4c.text:
In some cases it is natural to see a DMP in context. For example, the DMP should be seen in context with another formal document or a project could have sub-projects with their own DMP.

Examples:
* 'Umbrella DMP' for a research centre or consortium that defines shared practices. This 'master DMP' will be accompanied by DMPs for individual projects or work packages.
* Data collection plans for research cruises or expeditions
* Software management plans and other types of output management plans
e648be5a-ea9c-4dba-9865-fa68520f9c4c.title: This DMP is related to other DMP(s) or formal document(s)

e76de278-c8cd-4e64-b11f-b7aa91671218.text: Summarise the expected costs based on the previous questions. If you are converting currencies, remember to indicate the conversion rate.
e76de278-c8cd-4e64-b11f-b7aa91671218.title: What will be the total costs for data management in the project?

e7b6cd51-22a6-4f7a-9ad5-a7234fa436cb.text: Use the "Add" button to enter a new metadata standard/schema.
e7b6cd51-22a6-4f7a-9ad5-a7234fa436cb.title: List metadata standards/schemas you will use

e7b78db0-9a4b-4144-87ac-f3cac5baf9a8.title: Does the dataset have a persistent identifier, in the form of a DOI or similar?

e88046de-4e86-4aef-ad65-c8f48429e5ac.text:
Which data format will be collected? Is the file format standard and widely used by researchers in this field? 

Does this data format enable sharing and long term archiving? If file format conversions will be necessary, remember to describe them in the chapter 'Processing, analysing and interpreting data'.

Examples:
* Interview sound recordings (file format: .mp3, .flac)
* Interview transcripts as text files (file format: .txt)
e88046de-4e86-4aef-ad65-c8f48429e5ac.title: Collected data format

eab24ab0-3dc1-4b06-91bf-eff7ca9b6109.text:
All researches are to follow general research ethical guidelines and ethical considerations may affect how data will be handled and shared.

The list is based on resources provide by the National Research Ethics Committees (FEK). Additional and subject-specific ethical guidelines and codes of conduct can be added in the next question. Select the general research ethical guidelines applicable to the project. Several choices are possible.
eab24ab0-3dc1-4b06-91bf-eff7ca9b6109.title: Indicate applicable general research ethical guidelines

eacbd28d-747f-4c9b-abca-adaff37d533f.title: Which legal basis for collecting/processing personal data applies?

ecb23397-d44d-4623-8233-481e753492ea.text: What appointment have you made for the naming of the folders? Make sure names are relatively short, and avoid spaces and special characters.
ecb23397-d44d-4623-8233-481e753492ea.title: What are the naming conventions for the analysis folders?

ecca7dd6-62f2-4714-a85a-8d79bbca402a.text: Explain the procedure for authorized users to access private (e.g., personal) data (who is allowed to access it, what is required from them, etc.).
ecca7dd6-62f2-4714-a85a-8d79bbca402a.title: Describe the procedure for users to access private data

ed8b306d-5efa-4f1e-a8b3-998feefc22e8.text:
Commonly subject-specific guidelines and codes of conduct apply in addition to the general research ethical guidelines.

Please specify additional research ethical guidelines and codes of conduct that apply for the project.
ed8b306d-5efa-4f1e-a8b3-998feefc22e8.title: Are additional ethical guidelines or codes of conduct relevant?

ee59664e-4026-4796-a42a-e8003df6dadf.text: If a core facility, collaboration partner or subcontractor is executing measurements, consider listing them as project partners in the chapter 'Legal and ethical aspects', including any related contracts or agreements.
ee59664e-4026-4796-a42a-e8003df6dadf.title: Who will execute the measurements? And where?

f00cf643-5368-458a-97d4-b463c2000c66.text:
Begin typing to see a list of suggestions based on structured information in the FAIRsharing registry.

NB! Return to manual entry if you cannot find the data format/type.
f00cf643-5368-458a-97d4-b463c2000c66.title: Data format

f038bd46-ee4e-4f53-b7ea-482381c2c855.text:
Describe all types of data collection through questionnaires, interviews or observations that is not relying on measurement instrumentation. Use of e.g. recording equipment should be described as part of the collection methodology.

If you are collecting data about persons, make sure to provide all necessary information in the chapter 'Legal and ethical aspects'.
f038bd46-ee4e-4f53-b7ea-482381c2c855.title: The project will collect data through observations, questionnaires or interviews

f0b9f4e6-8f03-4a07-a41b-c67492ad4c2f.title: Which storage solution will be used for this data?

f0ca4f37-ef70-452e-b620-434d52fb5924.text:
Begin typing to see a list of suggestions based on the FAIRsharing standard registry.\
In case the metadata standard/schema is not found, type the name and click outside of the text box and the string will be saved.

You can provide context in the next question. If the standard is only applied to a subset of data, please specify.
f0ca4f37-ef70-452e-b620-434d52fb5924.title: Metadata standard/schema

f0ef08fd-d733-465c-bc66-5de0b826c41b.text: Title of the research project and if applicable, project acronym.
f0ef08fd-d733-465c-bc66-5de0b826c41b.title: Project title

f5f7aa9f-3eb6-4426-ad51-290298ee50e4.title: If applicable: Additional description of the data

f5fef09d-ade5-4019-b089-f05bd89c34bc.text: What is considered a set/collection of data may be structured according to the needs of the project. A logical unit can for example be all data recorded by a given instrument, or all measurements undertaken in a given setting or on a given set of samples.
f5fef09d-ade5-4019-b089-f05bd89c34bc.title: List data that you will acquire using measurement equipment

f67a9910-4ea3-4280-b503-386dff3b8305.text: In some fields, it is considered good practice to deposit samples to a public repository before deriving any digital data from them.
f67a9910-4ea3-4280-b503-386dff3b8305.title: Will the samples be preserved in a repository (e.g. museum archive, biobank)?

f67e1539-5c7d-4df7-8259-e4f2edfa2685.title: Will you be using common ontologies?

f691ad73-1284-4c7d-999d-34bb0612dd42.title: Did you arrange for system administration (at least security updates) and hardware maintenance for the server(s)?

f78fb7e9-2f26-493c-a19b-04e153c17274.text: Consider that users of a data set will need to be able to get access several years after the project is finished. The best way to arrange this is to put the responsibility for checking the rights to access the data with a fixed body in an organisation (a data access committee), rather than a single contact person (who might be unavailable in the future).
f78fb7e9-2f26-493c-a19b-04e153c17274.title: How will re-users be able to get access?

f83a9afd-c6de-452b-be9f-bd76e5eb6b54.text: Maintaining a repository is a long term commitment that can most of the time not be funded from project money. Think about who will be doing the system maintenance, hardware maintenance, and who will make necessary code changes to accommodate future (safe) versions of the system.
f83a9afd-c6de-452b-be9f-bd76e5eb6b54.title: Will you be able to support this repository for a sufficiently long time?

f87c331d-794a-42c8-a910-61a2a9110dab.text: Describe all types of data acquisition using measurement equipment or laboratory instruments.
f87c331d-794a-42c8-a910-61a2a9110dab.title: The project will capture data using measurement equipment

f8a1bf14-36c6-451f-af69-c5bd3f2b5c0d.text: Briefly describe what, where, type of identifier, access conditions and when the material will be deposited.
f8a1bf14-36c6-451f-af69-c5bd3f2b5c0d.title: Where will physical samples be preserved?

f8eeb548-f5af-4fc8-a5fd-88fdf28b0de1.title: Will you use a (sub)folder for each (repeated) analysis?

f90914d8-2731-4cd1-bbf8-2710a5e08c43.text: Sometimes, and empty field or a zero is indicating a missing value. But is that really unique? Could there be valid empty or zero fields? Has the convention for missing values been made explicit somewhere?
f90914d8-2731-4cd1-bbf8-2710a5e08c43.title: Is there a distinguishing way a missing value in the table can be recognized?

f9572d3c-c91f-4945-a56b-ccfb32750fe9.title: How will you store any applicable restrictions?

fac3e84c-9802-4dcf-9791-8c425161338e.title: Data integrity and quality measures

fcaac9ff-8c1b-4870-986e-e12c481fd869.title: Which data are you are planning to reuse?

fd1e8bd8-945e-45c5-964b-15e3227c6d3a.text: Explain the contributors' responsibility, if relevant (e.g. if responsibilities are shared).
fd1e8bd8-945e-45c5-964b-15e3227c6d3a.title: Responsibility

descriptions.description: This paper starts with an overview of the theoretical framework on quality of work and identifies five relevant dimensions, in line with Gallino & La Rosa: ergonomic, complexity, autonomy, control and economic dimensions. The above dimensions are described and measured by means of multivariate analysis to detect differences in terms of the factors affecting the level of the quality of work dimensions achieved. The data set that we use for this purpose is the Third Isfol Survey on Quality of Work (IsfolQdL) that has been carried out in 2010 on a sample of 5,000 workers and operationalizes the five dimensions of the quality of work. The results of the multivariate analysis confirm the worse achievements in terms of quality of work by temporary workers and lower skilled workers and lower level of achievements by women in the economic and autonomy dimensions. Women are also more likely to be found in part-time work positions and the latter show an improvement in the ergonomic dimension (that includes also work life balance) at the expenses of the economic and autonomy dimensions.

Regardless of the origin of the data in your project, data will likely be further processed, analysed and interpreted.

chapters.title: Processing, analysing and interpreting data

chapters.text:
This chapter collects information about the type and origin of the data that will be included in the project. This could be both datasets and records originating outside the project, as well as novel data collected, captured, generated or created by you or other project members. Different disciplines may use different terms to describe the data or records underlying a research project.

In this chapter, an inclusive approach is used with 'data' functioning as a broad and overarching term. This includes observational and experimental data, surveys, registry data, simulations, as well as data in digital museum archives and other data records.

[Supporting information for this chapter](https://plan.research-data.no/pages/support_05_reuse_collect)
chapters.title: Reusing and collecting data

chapters.text:
This chapter collects information about how metadata and other accompanying information will be handled in the active phase of the project. The planned use of metadata will benefit the research project both internally, among project members, as well as help make the data understandable and FAIR for external users and future reuse.  

[Supporting information for this chapter](https://plan.research-data.no/pages/support_06_document)
chapters.title: Data documentation during the project

chapters.text:
This chapters collects information about data storage and backup throughout the research project. Consider all digital data and documents that you are expecting to handle in the course of the project, including working documents.

If specific solutions are chosen during data processing and analysis or preservation, this may be specified in the respective chapters.

[Supporting information for this chapter](https://plan.research-data.no/pages/support_04_store_protect)
chapters.title: Storing and protecting data during the project

chapters.text:
